Creates or updates a secret token used to sign webhook payloads. The token is included in the x-adsk-signature header of callback requests for payload verification.

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The Webhooks API enables applications to listen for events from Autodesk services by creating webhook subscriptions. When events occur (such as file modifications, model derivative completions, or folder changes), Autodesk sends HTTP POST callbacks to a registered URL. This API manages webhook CRUD operations for the Data Management and Model Derivative event systems.
